task_completion.description: Navigate to the body measurements section in the wger fitness manager.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the wger application with a page showing body measurements, weight, or user statistics.

task_completion.description: Locate the erroneous Body Fat entry of 180.0%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table, list, or chart in the Body Fat section clearly showing an entry with the value 180.0.
A deletion confirmation page for the 180.0% entry, a success message indicating deletion, or the Body Fat list/chart no longer displaying the 180.0 value.

task_completion.description: Locate the erroneous Waist entry of 820.0cm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table, list, or chart in the Waist measurements section clearly showing an entry with the value 820.0.
A deletion confirmation page for the 820.0cm entry, a success message indicating deletion, or the Waist list/chart no longer displaying the 820.0 value.

task_completion.description: Ensure all other historical measurement data is preserved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The measurement tables or charts still display multiple normal entries (at least 5 valid entries per category) after the outliers have been removed.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the wger web interface to perform the deletions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the wger web application in a browser, rather than using terminal commands like curl or wget.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI using database commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show the execution of python scripts, Django shell commands, or direct SQL queries (e.g., sqlite3) to delete the records.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the deletion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to manually delete HTML nodes from the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Body Fat outlier value to be deleted is exactly 180.0. The target Waist outlier value to be deleted is exactly 820.0. There should be at least 5 valid measurements remaining in each category after the outliers are deleted.
